segments.original_text: つかみでリスクをつける!

segments.text: If it's a throw, that's the move!
segments.original_text: 投げならいいと思ってますね

segments.text: Are they even confirming the positioning?
segments.original_text: マウントすら確認しているか?

segments.text: Off the shield and grabs to extend!
segments.original_text: シールドに出して掴みで伸ばす!
これはちょっと確定か?

segments.text: Some sketchy moments there but the reads are tight!
segments.original_text: 怪しいっていうところもあって読み合ってきましたね

full_text: Going for the risky grab! If it's a throw, that's the move! Are they even confirming the positioning? Unconfirmed? Short hop dair! Confirmed! Off the shield and grabs to extend! Is this even slightly confirmed? Some sketchy moments there but the reads are tight! Stock! Stock!

corrections.rule: move abbreviation (SF→SJ, 空中しろ→空下)

corrections.original: シルブルに出してつかみで伸ばす!
corrections.corrected: シールドに出して掴みで伸ばす!
corrections.rule: misheard word (シルブル→シールド)
